root.name: Tornado for Scarlet
斯嘉丽龙卷风
root.description: For Scarlet pirates: burn to the orbit, lock and fire right after warp, shoot twice
打斯嘉丽海盗专用，冲轨道，跃迁结束锁定开火，打两次

branch.fit: [Tornado] [low] Republic Fleet Gyrostabilizer Gyrostabilizer II Gyrostabilizer II Reactor Control Unit II [med] 50MN Y-T8 Compact Microwarpdrive Multispectrum Shield Hardener II Multispectrum Shield Hardener II Large F-S9 Regolith Compact Shield Extender Medium Shield Extender II [high] 1400mm 'Scout' Artillery I 1400mm 'Scout' Artillery I 1400mm 'Scout' Artillery I 1400mm 'Scout' Artillery I 1400mm 'Scout' Artillery I 1400mm 'Scout' Artillery I 1400mm 'Scout' Artillery I 1400mm 'Scout' Artillery I [rig] Medium Ancillary Current Router I Medium Projectile Collision Accelerator II [cargo] Republic Fleet EMP L x4000
